Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Mar-30-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Frank Cialone, via zoom, for Norman Berkman, Petitioner.

The court advises that this matter had been set for hearing to allow any objections and notes that there are no appearances to object. Mr. Cialone reports of a declaration regarding waiver of notice submitted for efiling on Friday 3/25/2022.

The Petition for Instructions is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Teebay. Not reported.
